NAME: National Center for Biotechnology Information
DESCRIPTION: The U.S. **National Center for Biotechnology Information** is NIH’s primary bioinformatics hub: literature (**PubMed**), reference sequences (**RefSeq**, **GenBank**), analysis tools, and major data archives. As an INSDC partner it exchanges nucleotide data with **ENA** and **DDBJ**. **SRA** stores raw sequencing reads; **dbGaP** provides controlled access to participant-level genotype and phenotype data; **GEO** archives functional genomics; **ClinVar** aggregates variant interpretations for clinical and research use. Datasets routinely cross-link to PubMed and Gene records.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: PubMed
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Bibliographic index** of biomedical literature with abstracts and links to full text where available; central entry point for citations tied to NCBI sequence and GEO records.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: GenBank
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Annotated nucleotide sequence database** and INSDC exchange partner—deposits receive accessions mirrored with [ENA](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ena) and [DDBJ](https://www.ddbj.nig.ac.jp/).

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: SRA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Sequence Read Archive**—high-volume store for raw sequencing output (reads, run metadata) with INSDC exchange alongside [ENA](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ena) and [DDBJ](https://www.ddbj.nig.ac.jp/).

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: RefSeq
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Non-redundant reference sequences** (genomes, transcripts, proteins) used for annotation, variant reporting, and stable **NM_/NP_** accessions in clinical and research workflows.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: ClinVar
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Archive of genomic variant interpretations** (pathogenicity, drug response) aggregated from submitters; integrates with **dbSNP** and clinical testing pipelines.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: dbGaP
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Database of Genotypes and Phenotypes**—study-level portal for **controlled-access** participant genotype, phenotype, and omics under NIH data-use agreements.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: GEO
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Gene Expression Omnibus**—curated submissions of array- and sequencing-based **functional genomics** and expression profiling, with series and sample records.
